failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: Osra0N
- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Embedding service error: Client error '404 Not Found' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-embedding-embeddingservicecontainer-api.modal.run/embed'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404","timestamp":"2026-04-12T13:32:26.484746+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog", "model": "sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed

1. Test Case ID: Osra0N
- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Embedding service error: Client error '404 Not Found' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-embedding-embeddingservicecontainer-api.modal.run/embed'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404","timestamp":"2026-04-12T13:32:26.484746+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:

1. Test Case ID: YFN8yJ
- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Embedding service error: Client error '404 Not Found' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-embedding-embeddingservicecontainer-api.modal.run/embed-batch'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404","timestamp":"2026-04-12T13:32:26.773637+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"texts": ["First document to embed", "Second document to embed", "Third document to embed"], "model": null}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/batch

- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Embedding service error: Client error '404 Not Found' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-embedding-embeddingservicecontainer-api.modal.run/embed-batch'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404","timestamp":"2026-04-12T13:32:27.073823+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text1": "Machine learning is AI", "text2": "Deep learning is machine learning", "model": null}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/similarity

1. Test Case ID: 5X3KV3
- Server error
[502] Bad Gateway:
`{"error":"Reindex service request failed: [Errno -2] Name or service not known","timestamp":"2026-04-12T13:32:38.089676+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/scrape/reindex?verbose=false&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

1. Test Case ID: 5X3KV3
- Server error
[502] Bad Gateway:
`{"error":"Reindex service request failed: [Errno -2] Name or service not known","timestamp":"2026-04-12T13:32:38.089676+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/scrape/reindex?verbose=false&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

1. Test Case ID: T68Fce
- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Unable to connect to agent service: Request URL is missing an 'http://' or 'https://' protocol.","timestamp":"2026-04-12T13:32:27.668606+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/ask?question=Can+you+summarize+this+in+3+key+points%3F&thread_id=default&context_answer=Nearby+clinics+include+Eastside+Community+Health+Center+%28walk-ins+welcome%29+and+Northside+Family+Medicine.&lang=en&provider=ollama&model=llama3.1%3A8b&tags=housing%2Cpermits&tag_match_mode=any&include_untagged_fallback=True&rerank=False&rerank_top_k=5'

1. Test Case ID: T68Fce
- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Unable to connect to agent service: Request URL is missing an 'http://' or 'https://' protocol.","timestamp":"2026-04-12T13:32:27.668606+00:00"}`
